description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a paved driveway and landscaped yard featuring several trees. The front facade has a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a garage to one side. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, creating a private recreational space. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with large, evenly spaced windows providing ample natural light. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the property is bordered by a mix of paved and green areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor living, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, garage, and a backyard featuring a patio and swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, garage, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the flat roof, rear patio, pool, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by windows and adjacent to a garage
